mapper.select: SELECT menu_id AS menuId, parent_id AS parentId, route_id AS routeId, menu_name AS menuName, icon, order_num AS orderNum, required_permission AS requiredPermission, required_any_permissions AS requiredAnyPermissions, required_role_keys AS requiredRoleKeys FROM sys_menu WHERE visible = 1 AND status = '0' AND route_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY parent_id ASC, order_num ASC, menu_id ASC

WITH user_roles AS ( SELECT DISTINCT r.role_id, r.role_key FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = '0' ), user_permissions AS ( SELECT DISTINCT rp.permission_key FROM user_roles ur JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id ), navigation_policy AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MAX(r.navigation_isolated), 0) = 1 AS isolated FROM user_roles ur JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id ), child_menus AS ( SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m WHERE m.parent_id != 0 AND m.visible = 1 AND m.status = '0' AND m.route_id IS NOT NULL AND ( ( (SELECT isolated FROM navigation_policy) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_roles ur JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE rm.menu_id = m.menu_id ) ) OR ( NOT (SELECT isolated FROM navigation_policy) AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_roles ur JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE rm.menu_id = m.menu_id ) OR ( m.required_permission IS NULL AND m.required_any_permissions IS NULL AND m.required_role_keys IS NULL ) OR ( m.required_permission IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_permissions up WHERE up.permission_key = m.required_permission ) ) OR ( m.required_any_permissions IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_permissions up WHERE up.permission_key = ANY(regexp_split_to_array(m.required_any_permissions, '\s*,\s*')) ) ) OR ( m.required_role_keys IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_roles ur WHERE ur.role_key = ANY(regexp_split_to_array(m.required_role_keys, '\s*,\s*')) ) ) ) ) ) ), granted_menus AS ( SELECT * FROM child_menus UNION SELECT parent.* FROM sys_menu parent JOIN child_menus child ON child.parent_id = parent.menu_id WHERE parent.visible = 1 AND parent.status = '0' AND parent.route_id IS NOT NULL ) SELECT DISTINCT menu_id AS menuId, parent_id AS parentId, route_id AS routeId, menu_name AS menuName, icon, order_num AS orderNum, required_permission AS requiredPermission, required_any_permissions AS requiredAnyPermissions, required_role_keys AS requiredRoleKeys FROM granted_menus ORDER BY parent_id ASC, order_num ASC, menu_id ASC
